name: startup-playbook-topic-pain-miner
description: Mine public topic discussions into demand validation pain heatmaps.

scripts.analyze:beauty-log: node scripts/analyze-topic.mjs --config data/beauty-log.reddit.json --input output/beauty-log-posts.json --output output/beauty-log-pain-report.md --analysis-output output/beauty-log-analysis.json --html-output output/beauty-log-heatmap.html --llm-prompt-output output/beauty-log-llm-prompt.txt
